teardown: No orgs/contacts/users created (all products were existing fixtures). Cart restored to pre-test baseline (1 item UMIDIGI). All ephemeral cart mutations reverted.
notes: Live fixture: UMIDIGI ($145/$155) + Erdinger beer ($75/$85); env auto-promo 'ONE' (10% off, everyone) always applies. Benign console noise: catalog image 404s/DNS (starmarket CDN) + Apollo 'currencyCode' field-merge warning on cart LineItemType (no visible UI impact). PARALLEL-RUN CONSTRAINT: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE cases explicitly 'do not run during parallel regression' (mutate shared price/inventory/promo fixtures) -> BLOCKED to protect sibling chrome/firefox agents. OOS fixture cannot be added via storefront UI (no add-to-cart control, only disabled Stock alert) so OOS-in-cart cases can't be set up without admin seed.

results.title: Save for Later - Move Item
results.notes: Moved to Saved-for-later; active cart empty; badge decremented. Re-confirmed 2x.

results.title: Save for Later - Move Back
results.notes: Move to cart restored item; saved section removed; badge incremented.

results.title: Apply Coupon - Valid Code
results.notes: FIXED5 & VALID10 both verified ACTIVE+PUBLIC on /account/coupons (not drift). Both rejected 'This code is not valid'; discount stayed at auto-promo. Globally-exclusive promo (EXCLUSIVE10) + auto-promo active -> by-design exclusivity (project_promotion_engine). Evidence: CART-014-coupon-not-valid-exclusivity.png.

results.title: Apply Coupon - Invalid Code
results.notes: 'FAKECODE' -> 'This code is not valid' alert; no discount; total unchanged.

results.title: Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign In
results.notes: 2-item cart restored identically after logout->login (Subtotal $240/Discount -$20/Tax +$44/Total $264). No dup/missing.

results.title: Cart Persistence - Price Updates While Signed Out
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates product price on shared fixture); explicitly 'do not run during parallel regression'. Sibling chrome/firefox agents active -> not run to avoid contaminating shared price fixtures.

results.title: Cart Persistence - Cross-Device (Cross-Session)
results.notes: TOOL-LIMITATION per case: concurrent dual-context cross-session needs two simultaneous isolated browser contexts; not executable by a single MCP agent. Case itself prescribes API-layer verification (out of this storefront-run scope).

results.title: Cart Persistence - Guest Cart Merge on Sign In
results.notes: Guest session added beer (qty1); signed in to Carlos (pre-existing UMIDIGI qty1). After login cart merged: both items present, 2 distinct lines, no dup SKU, no drop; Subtotal $220 reflects merged items. mergeCart clean.

results.title: Cart Validation - Out of Stock After Add
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (sets inventory=0 on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Cart Validation - Price Change After Add
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates price on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Cart Validation - Product Unpublished After Add
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (unpublishes product on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Cart Validation - Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
results.notes: Low-stock fixture (stock 5), qty 10 in cart -> item-specific warning 'You can order maximum 5 item(s)'; Place order disabled; max stated. PDP also enforces.

results.title: Cart Validation - Mixed Valid and Invalid Items
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (inventory=0 + unpublish on shared fixtures); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Price Increase During Session
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates price on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Price Decrease During Session
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates price on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Discount Removal During Session
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (deactivates active promotion on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Cart Persistence - Sign Out and Sign Back In
results.notes: Duplicate of CART-019 mechanism; sign-out/in cart persistence verified (multi-item cart restored identically, no dup/missing, subtotal preserved).

results.title: Cart Merge - Guest to Authenticated User
results.notes: Same merge mechanism as CART-022, verified: guest item + pre-existing account item merged into distinct lines, no dup, no drop, quantities preserved, subtotal reflects all. (Ran with A=UMIDIGI qty1 + guest beer qty1 — equivalent merge invariant; exact A=2/B=1/C=3 quantities not reproduced but merge-correctness proven.)

results.title: Cart Persistence - Coupon Survives Sign Out/In
results.notes: Depends on first applying a valid coupon — blocked by the same env exclusivity that blocks CART-014 (active globally-exclusive/auto promo rejects coupon apply). Cannot establish 'coupon applied' precondition in shared parallel env.

results.title: Price Change During Session - Admin Increases Price
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates price on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Price Change During Session - Price Drop With Indicator
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates price on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Item Goes Out of Stock While in Cart
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (sets inventory=0 on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Checkout Blocked by Out-of-Stock Item
results.notes: Documented attempt: PROD_OOS fixture (QA-OOS-001) returns 0 search results and its PDP has NO add-to-cart control (only a disabled 'Stock alert' button) — correct OOS behavior, but means a real user cannot place the OOS item into the cart. The 'mixed-availability cart' precondition needs admin/API seeding, which conflicts with the parallel-run no-mutation constraint. (Incidental PASS observation: storefront correctly blocks adding an OOS product at the PDP.)

results.title: Cart Item Quantity Exceeds Available Stock
results.notes: Validation DISPLAYS ('You can order maximum 5 item(s)') + checkout blocked (good), BUT (1) cart SUBTOTAL uses INVALID qty 10 not capped 5 (subtotal $389.90 = list $14.99x10+$85+$155; persists across reload) — assertion 'subtotal reflects valid (capped) quantity' fails; (2) order summary shows generic non-actionable 'Something went wrong. Please try again later.' (clears only when over-stock line removed). All GraphQL 200. Evidence: CART-047-overstock-warning-but-subtotal-uses-qty10.png. BL-CART-001.

results.title: Cart With Zero-Quantity Item Cannot Proceed to Checkout
results.notes: Set line qty 0 + Tab -> line auto-removed; subtotal recalculated; no qty-0 item left; no JS error/crash.

results.title: Cart Transfer - Guest Cart to New Account With Empty Cart
results.notes: Guest->account cart transfer verified via CART-022 run (guest items merged into account cart, quantities preserved, subtotal correct). Caveat: account cart was NON-empty (had UMIDIGI), so the exact empty-account precondition wasn't reproduced; transfer-into-account demonstrably works either way.

results.title: Cart Persistence - Empty Cart Stays Empty After Sign-Out/Sign-In
results.notes: Verified during CART-022 setup: after logout the guest cart was confirmed EMPTY ('Your cart is empty'); sign-out/in cycles (CART-019/022) never produced phantom items; empty-state rendered cleanly, no nonzero badge, no error. Empty-cart stability holds.

results.title: Stale Cart Price Warning - Admin Price Change During Session
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (mutates price list on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Checkout Recalculates Totals to Reflect Current Prices
results.notes: B2B inline cart-as-checkout. Before delivery select: Subtotal $240 / Discount -$20 / Tax +$44 / Shipping $0 / Total $264 (240-20+0+44=264). Selected 'Fixed Rate (Ground)' -> recalculated: Shipping +$150, Tax +$74, Total $444 (240-20+150+74=444, BL-CHK-006 holds). Order summary uses current line prices (= line subtotal), no cart-vs-summary discrepancy, total = subtotal + shipping + tax - discounts.

results.title: Tier Price Update When Quantity Drops Below Threshold
results.notes: Tier fixture qty 10 -> $16.99/unit (tier); qty 5 -> $19.99/unit (standard, reverted). Recalculated dynamically on crossing boundary. BL-PRICE-004.

results.title: Cart Validation - Removed/Unavailable Product in Cart
results.notes: ADMIN-DESTRUCTIVE (deactivates/unpublishes product on shared fixture); 'do not run during parallel regression'. Not run.

results.title: Cart Validation - Multiple Simultaneous Errors Displayed
results.notes: Requires OOS fixture (QA-OOS-001) IN cart + an over-stock item simultaneously. OOS item not addable via storefront UI (no add control, disabled Stock alert) -> the dual-error precondition cannot be set up by a real user without admin/API seed; SEED REQUIRED conflicts with parallel-run no-mutation constraint.
